ItacWorkItem.ShortTitle: Francisci Antonii Casertae Neap.ni Tractationes Duae Ad Medicinae praxim pertinentes.
ItacWorkItem.LongTitle: Altera de Natura, & Usu Aquarum potabilium, tum in sanis, tum in aegris corporibus. Alia de Natura, & Usu Vinorum, tum in sanis, tum in aegrotis. Cum Indice Questionum, Articulorum, & Dubiorum. Ad Illustriss. Et Reverendiss. D. D. Odoardum Farnesium S.R.E. Card. Ampliss. Ac Episcopum Sabiensem.
ItacWorkItem.Illustration: Plate|Coat of arms of the Farnese family
ItacWorkItem.CensorsAgreement: Imprimatur Laelius Tastius Vic. Gen. Neap. M. Antonius Palumbus Theol. Dep. vidit. Mag. Philocalus Caputus Carmel. Theol. Dep. vidit.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
